title: savignya parviflora subsp. globosa
intro: Savignya parviflora subsp. globosa, also known as the globous Savignya, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Savignya parviflora subsp. globosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant involve using its leaves and roots to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
